# mailcow_bcc (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_bcc" "outbound" {
  type       = "sender"
  local_dest = "@example.com"
  bcc_dest   = "archive@example.com"
  active     = true
}

resource "mailcow_bcc" "inbound" {
  type       = "recipient"
  local_dest = "user@example.com"
  bcc_dest   = "archive@example.com"
  active     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bcc_dest` (String) Destination address to BCC
- `local_dest` (String) Local address or domain to match (e.g. "user@example.com" or "@example.com")
- `type` (String) BCC map type: "sender" (outbound) or "recipient" (inbound)

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this BCC rule is active

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
